response:
```sql
SELECT s.name, to_char(date_trunc('week', p.consent_date), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS week, COUNT(p.patient_id) AS enrolled
FROM app.sites s
JOIN app.studies st ON st.study_id = s.study_id
JOIN app.patients p ON p.site_id = s.site_id
WHERE st.code = 'MOON-2026'
  AND s.sponsor_id = :sponsor
  AND p.consent_date >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '60 days')
  AND s.site_id IN (
    SELECT s2.site_id
    FROM app.sites s2
    JOIN app.studies st2 ON st2.study_id = s2.study_id
    LEFT JOIN app.patients p2 ON p2.site_id = s2.site_id
    WHERE st2.code = 'MOON-2026'
      AND s2.sponsor_id = :sponsor
    GROUP BY s2.site_id, s2.target_enrollment
    HAVING 100.0 * COUNT(p2.patient_id) / s2.target_enrollment < 80
  )
GROUP BY s.name, date_trunc('week', p.consent_date)
ORDER BY date_trunc('week', p.consent_date)
LIMIT 100;
```
